text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I... just want to catch up to my friend... That's the
only goal I have...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I don't mind if nobody else can see my friend...
because they are right beside me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
